response.justification: Bogdan is a highly technical, hands-on Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and diverse programming language experience. However, this is an executive CTO role requiring 5+ years of senior technical leadership, experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+, and extensive production multi-agent AI experience in high-stakes environments. The candidate lacks the requisite executive leadership experience, team scaling history, and deep AI-native fintech architecture background required for this position.
strengths: Extensive hands-on engineering experience across the stack, including high-throughput microservices (millions of req/sec at Dunnhumby).
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong engineering craftsmanship, demonstrated through open-source contributions (GISCollective) and TDD advocacy.
concerns: No evidence of executive-level engineering leadership or experience scaling an engineering team from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks deep, multi-year production experience building and operating autonomous multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes commercial environments.
Missing experience in AI-native fintech integration, such as algorithmic working-capital allocation and real-time credit-risk assessment.
